patch.value: Publish package gallery and marketplace metadata
Define pm package discoverability metadata and marketplace/catalog generation, informed by Pi's pi-package keyword, gallery image/video fields, npm links, repo links, and report links.
Package metadata fields are documented; package list/catalog command or generated artifact exists; npm keywords and public docs support package discovery.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Plan item created from pi.dev/packages research: package discovery depends on npm keywords plus catalog metadata such as package type,media preview,repo,and report links.
